creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: cperciva
Date: Sat Apr 11 17:48:13 UTC 2020
New revision: 531444
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/531444

Log:
  Use canonical spelling of "/nonexistent".

  I accidentally spelled this as "/nonexistent/" yesterday, which broke
  the special handling of that path and resulted in /nonexistent existing.

  PR:		245537
  Submitted by:	Thomas Hurst

Changes:
  head/UIDs
